Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores — stigmaR
text: Merges state-level structural stigma indicators dataset based Movement Advancement Project (MAP) policy data.

title: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores — stigmaR
text: df data frame containing data state_name Character string specifying column name df contains state abbreviations (e.g., "IL", "CA") indicator Character string specifying stigma indicator use. Options : "map_total": Total stigma score across policies "map_sex": Sexual orientation-specific policies "map_gender": Gender identity-specific policies new_var Character string specifying name new variable create df containing stigma scores

title: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores — stigmaR
text: input data frame df additional column containing state-level stigma scores. Unmatched states NA values.

title: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores — stigmaR
text: function matches state abbreviations data pre-calculated stigma scores based MAP policy data. States found reference data assigned NA warning displayed showing states matched.

title: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores — stigmaR
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Add total stigma scores my_data <- stigmaR(   df = my_data,   state_name = "state",   indicator = "map_total",   new_var = "stigma_score" )  # Add sexual orientation-specific scores my_data <- stigmaR(   df = my_data,   state_name = "state_abbrev",   indicator = "map_sex",   new_var = "so_stigma" ) } # }
